answer:
The distance from r to s is 50 km, and s is as far from r as it is from q, so r to q is also 50 km.  
Since p to r is half of r to q, p to r is 25 km.  
Thus, p to q is 25 km + 50 km = 75 km, but this does not match any option, so reinterpreting: s is as far from r as from q means r to s equals s to q, so r to q is 100 km, p to r is 50 km, and p to q is 150 km.  

\boxed{A}
